_source_note: SMALL STARTER SAMPLE. Replace with a compressed export of the ONCHigh high-priority drug-drug interaction dataset before your clinical audit day.

interactions.description: Risk of hyperkalemia (ACE inhibitor + potassium-sparing diuretic).
Increased risk of myopathy/rhabdomyolysis (CYP3A4 inhibition raises statin levels).
Risk of lactic acidosis around imaging with IV contrast; usually held periprocedurally.
Serotonin syndrome risk (SSRI + opioid with serotonergic activity).
